description_long: This is a medium-sized, soft-structured yellow handbag with a slouchy silhouette and a slightly rounded base. The exterior is made of a matte, leather-like material and features multiple metal rivets and rings in a brass finish, which secure the dual handles and shoulder strap. On one side, there is a horizontal zippered pocket, while the opposite side has a patch pocket with a flap and snap closure. The bag has a spacious main compartment, likely accessed via a zipper at the top, and the handles are attached with reinforced stitching and metal hardware. The overall design is functional yet stylish, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A yellow, soft-structured handbag with dual handles, brass hardware, and exterior pockets. The design is practical and stylish, featuring a matte leather-like finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main zippered pocket and the dual handles with brass hardware.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slouchy shape and the attachment points of the handles and strap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a patch pocket with a flap and snap closure, as well as the reinforced handle attachments.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the bag's depth and the arrangement of the handles and strap.
attribute_strap_type: Two short handles and one medium-length shoulder strap, all fixed with metal rings and rivets; not visibly adjustable.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Main compartment likely secured with a zipper at the top; exterior pockets use a zipper and a snap button flap.
attribute_decorative_elements: Brass-tone metal rivets and rings; no additional decorative elements.
